name: Frozen Fruit Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened pineapple sherbet with the thawed frozen raspberries.
2. Fold in the cubed bananas until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture into covered plastic containers and place them in the freezer.
4. The dessert can be prepared ahead of time and stored in the freezer for later use.
5. For variations, you may mix equal parts softened pineapple sherbet and vanilla ice cream, along with thawed frozen strawberries and cubed bananas.
